title: Warehouse Assistance
description:
Responsibilities:

The successful candidate(s) will report directly to Manager and be responsible for the

followings:

Upkeep the stock in the warehouse

Picking & Packing of goods

Loading and unloading of goods

Receive incoming goods

Other assigned warehousing duties

Requirements:

Singaporean / PR 

Basic computer knowledge

3 Year job experience in the same industry

5 days weeks (08.30 – 18.00)



postedCompany.description:
OUR HERITAGE

Kingfisher Automotive Pte Ltd, was established by its founder MR. Gunther Richard Meyer in 1989 under its former name GRM trading Pte Ltd. The company started its trade specializing in commodity trading with special focus on natural rubber for the tyres industry in the early years. The expansion into the domain of components and spares parts supplies for the automotive aftermarket came naturally to a firm already immersed in the industry. The growth in our automotive portfolio eventually reached a stage where it dominates 80% of our entire business. The name Kingfisher Automotive Pte Ltd which has a symbol of peace and prosperity in Greek mythology was then chosen to reflect the changed in its business nature with strong focus on Automotives parts supplies. The company continued to build its portfolio in industrial products by distributing precision laser cutting head from PRECITEC and high quality industrial switches from BERNSTEIN.

OUR PRODUCTS & SERVICES

Today, we are product distributors for an exclusive selection of the most prominent European Automotive brands such as WABCO, FAG, LUK, INA, FTE, HELLA, MANN FILTERS, ATLAS, OPTI-BELTS and JLM Lubricants. We also offer quality products and quality service with focused on suspension, chassis, and engine parts. We have partnership with OEM supplier’s which give us access to original Mercedes and MAN parts too. We strive to be a "one-stop-shop" partner to our most valuable asset, our customers.

Our industrial portfolio caters to the specific demands of the M&E and Electronic Manufacturing Industries in Singapore and the region. As an exclusive partner for BERNSTEIN and PRECITEC from Germany, we have a wide range of products available for a myriad of applications.
postedCompany.name: KINGFISHER AUTOMOTIVE PTE LTD
